decisions_made: Dropped Models/ScrollState.swift enum in favor of three @State vars (simpler)
Used Timer.scheduledTimer instead of deprecated CVDisplayLink
AVAudioEngine RMS threshold for voice detection (Option B, not SFSpeechRecognizer)
Added --qa-visible launch flag so visual QA can screencapture the otherwise-invisible panel
Used GENERATE_INFOPLIST_FILE + INFOPLIST_KEY_* instead of hand-written Info.plist
